description: AI-first component manifests. aiManifest is safe to show to LLM2 as natural game intent. compilerManifest is deterministic target metadata and must not be part of the LLM2-facing command surface.

fieldNotes.aiManifest: Natural component card for LLM2. Use aliases and game-world language only; do not teach module ids, component ids, runtime adapter names, coordinates, event indexes, or key=value command shapes.
fieldNotes.compilerManifest: Internal compiler target. Owns component id selection, inheritance defaults, required/provided capabilities, input bindings, relation templates, placement policy, runtime adapters, and bridge target hints.
fieldNotes.extends: Compiler-only parent component id or parent id array. Used for internal component families such as touch buttons and inventory storage/panel composition; abstract parents must not be exposed to LLM2.
fieldNotes.adapterRoutes: Required for each gdjsBridge.runtimeAdapters entry. Owns runtime adapter owner/mechanism/route evidence in compiler manifests instead of hard-coding adapter metadata in the bridge.
fieldNotes.objectSpec: Optional GDJS object emission contract. When present, it owns target object type plus object/layer/placement emission route evidence; required visual defaults must come from inherited defaultConfig.
fieldNotes.inheritance: Required when defaultConfig exists. contracts names inherited internal capability contracts, defaultOwner must be component-manifest, exposedOverrides lists natural values the Intent compiler may override, and sealedDefaults lists default keys that must stay internal.
fieldNotes.overrides: Only exposedOverrides may be changed from natural Intent AST values. LLM2 must never write compiler config keys or key=value fields.
